data.title: Hello, world from Vapor
data.excerpt: A blog post stored as a JSON file in @webhouse/cms and rendered by a Vapor 4 server-side Swift application.
data.content:
## The setup

This post lives at `content/posts/hello-world.json`. **Vapor reads it directly** via the `WebhouseReader` class — no API calls, no database, just `FileManager` and `JSONDecoder`.

## Server-side Swift

Vapor 4 is the dominant server-side Swift framework. Built on SwiftNIO for non-blocking I/O, it scales to thousands of concurrent connections per machine. The reader is `Sendable` and thread-safe.

## What's in this example

- `Sources/App/Webhouse.swift` — the reader (~150 LOC)
- `Sources/App/routes.swift` — Vapor route handlers
- `Sources/App/configure.swift` — Vapor + Leaf setup
- `Resources/Views/` — Leaf templates (Vapor's templating engine)
data.author: Christian Broberg
